(a) The department shall adopt rules for determining whether a domicile has been established under Section 522.022 (License Requirements) , including rules prescribing the types of documentation the department may require from the applicant to determine the validity of the claimed domicile.

(b) The department may contract with a third-party personal data verification service to assist the department in verifying a claim of domicile, including whether the physical address provided by the applicant is the applicant’s actual residence.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 522. Commercial Driver's Licenses
##### § 522.0225 — Verification of Domicile

(a) The department shall adopt rules for determining whether a domicile has been established under Section 522.022 (License Requirements) , including rules prescribing the types of documentation the department may require from the applicant to determine the validity of the claimed domicile.

(b) The department may contract with a third-party personal data verification service to assist the department in verifying a claim of domicile, including whether the physical address provided by the applicant is the applicant’s actual residence.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 1146 (H.B.2730), Sec. 13.05, eff. June 19, 2009.*
